description_long: This is a rectangular, metallic-looking bottle with a long neck and a slightly flared shoulder. The front face features a bold black label with a large white 'T' and a smaller '6' in the lower right corner, giving it a distinctive, branded appearance. The back side displays a detailed label with gold and white text, listing awards and locations, suggesting a premium or collectible product. The sides are mostly plain, with one side showing additional text and graphics, while the other is unadorned and shows signs of surface wear. The bottle's surface appears to be matte with visible scuff marks and discoloration, indicating age or frequent handling. The cap is integrated and appears metallic, matching the rest of the bottle's finish.
description: A rectangular metallic bottle with a long neck, bold black and white front label, and detailed award text on the back. The surface is matte with visible wear and scuff marks.
description_view_0: Front view shows a black label with a large white 'T' and a small '6' on the lower right.
description_view_1: Back view features a detailed label with gold and white text about awards and locations.
description_view_2: Side view is plain, showing the metallic surface with visible wear and no labels.
description_view_3: Other side view displays additional text and graphics, partially visible, on a black background.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label: large white 'T' with a small '6' on a black background. Back label: gold and white text listing awards and locations. Side label: additional text and graphics in white on black.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible surface wear, scuff marks, and discoloration.
